summary: Frontend UI verification testing for 15 UI corrections batch. Tested all specified features including Boutique search/categories, Design Services (3 services), POD Design toolbar (no Add Text), Bulk Orders color input, Admin pages, and Cart payment options.

boutique_page.search_bar: PASS - Search bar present at top of page
boutique_page.additional_filters: PASS - For (All/Adults/Kids) and Gender (All/Male/Female/Unisex) filters present

design_services_page.logo_design: PASS - Logo Design service card present
design_services_page.tshirt_artwork: PASS - T-Shirt Artwork service card present
design_services_page.event_flyers: PASS - Event Flyers service card present

pod_design_page.add_text_button: PASS - 'Add Text' button NOT present (as expected)
pod_design_page.manual_color_input: PASS - Manual color input field with 'Other color...' placeholder and 'Set' button present

bulk_orders_page.other_color_input: PASS - 'Other color' input field with data-testid='custom-color-input' present
bulk_orders_page.add_button: PASS - 'Add' button for custom color present
bulk_orders_page.size_inputs: PASS - 7 size input fields (XS, S, M, L, XL, 2XL, 3XL) present

admin_login.login: PASS - Successfully logged in with superadmin@temaruco.com / superadmin123

admin_orders_page.date_time_column: PASS - 'DATE & TIME' column header visible in orders table

admin_all_products_page.image_upload_modal: PASS - Modal opens with image upload field (JPG, PNG, WebP • Max 5MB)

admin_guest_designs_page.scrollable_table: VERIFIED IN CODE - overflow-auto max-h-[70vh] on container, min-w-[900px] on table, sticky header

cart_page.bank_transfer_option: PASS - No separate manual bank transfer option (text 'bank transfer' is part of Flutterwave description)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 UI corrections verified successfully. Admin session expires quickly - need to login fresh for each admin page test. Cart page 'bank transfer' text is part of Flutterwave description, not a separate payment method.
notes: All specified UI corrections have been implemented correctly. The 'bank transfer' text in Cart payment modal is describing Flutterwave's payment options (card, bank transfer, mobile money via Flutterwave), not a separate manual bank transfer option.
